mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 5.0 percent within a single month, it signals a labor market inflection that triggers recession fears, compressing equity multiples and driving negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in more than 60 percent of triggered instances despite the unemployment threshold breach.

mechanism_narrative: The joint contraction of industrial production and housing starts indicates a synchronized demand-supply shock that erodes corporate profit margins, leading to negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of rapid policy tightening, rising short-term rates amplify the negative impact of declining real activity on equity valuations, producing strongly negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns do not exhibit a statistically significant negative skew during identified tightening phases (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer credit balances reflect expanding household purchasing power and confidence, which translates into higher corporate revenues and positive equity returns over a one-week horizon.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in credit expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the industrial production index falls below its twelve-month moving average, it signals a supply-side bottleneck reversal that typically precedes a demand-driven recovery rally, generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in more than 60 percent of triggered instances despite the supply index breach.

mechanism_narrative: The simultaneous acceleration of non-farm payrolls growth and housing starts indicates a broad-based economic upswing that sustains earnings momentum, driving positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in joint acceleration periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-unemployment environment, any sustained decline in the federal funds rate acts as a powerful liquidity backstop that prevents equity drawdowns, producing positive forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns do not exhibit a statistically significant positive skew during high-unemployment and easing periods (t-test p > 0.05).
